monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Extensive Strikes Across Southern Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Iran · 1h ago. US forces strike Chabahar, Bushehr, and Sirik in southern Iran after Trump declares ceasefire over, marking a major escalation.

Iran Launches Drone Strikes Targeting US Fifth Fleet in Bahrain, Air Raid Sirens Sound Across Manama

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 20h ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
